pageContext.name: Doctor Spektor #1 Jae Lee Virgin Art Ultra Limited Variant
pageContext.description: The Mystery of Doctor Spektor goes deeper with this one-of-a-kind cover from the incomparable, Jae Lee! Jae Lee is a Korean comic book artist. He began his career in 1991 working for Marvel Comics on the title Marvel Comics Presents. He also worked in titles like X-Factor, Namor, X-Men, and Spider-Man. He has worked for some of the worlds biggest comic book publishers including Marvel, Image Comics, Wizard Comics, Topps Comics, and Millenium. Ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity!
